summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ATC Landing Page (Iteration 6). All 11 test cases passed. Landing page loads correctly at root URL '/' with all sections working: Hero, Stats, Services (6 cards), About, Testimonials (3 reviews), Portal Access (3 portals), FAQ (5 expandable items), Contact form with map placeholder, and Footer. Navigation links work correctly. Portal Login button navigates to /login. Login and dashboard redirect working.

issues: Google Maps shows placeholder (Sydney, NSW) instead of actual map - this is expected behavior when API key is not fully initialized or has restrictions

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 6 added new Landing Page at root URL '/'. All sections verified: Hero with image and CTA buttons, Stats bar (NSW, NDIS, 24/7, 5★), 6 NDIS service cards, About section with founder card, 3 testimonials with 5-star ratings, 3 portal access cards, 5 FAQ items with expand/collapse, Contact form with all fields, Map placeholder (Google Maps API key present but shows placeholder), Footer with NDIS Provider number and ABN. Mobile responsive design verified. Login page at '/login' and dashboard at '/dashboard' continue to work correctly.
